name: Bagani Laon Burst 15W-40
shortDesc: Peak power top choice diesel engine oil. For light and heavy-duty diesel and gasoline engines.
description: A high-quality commercial multi-grade engine oil suitable for both light and heavy-duty diesel and gasoline engines. Specifically formulated for the lubrication of commercial vehicle engines, including those operating on high-sulfur diesel fuels. Meets the performance requirements of modern low-emission diesel engines as well as high-performance gasoline engines, making it ideal for mixed-fleet operations.
description2: Engineered to provide excellent thermal and oxidation stability, high levels of detergency and dispersancy, effective corrosion protection, and superior load-carrying capacity. Meets major OEM approvals including Mercedes-Benz 228.3, MAN 3275, Volvo VDS-2, and Cummins.

specs.Oil Type: Heavy Duty Diesel / Gasoline Engine Oil

features.title: Excellent Thermal & Oxidation Stability
features.desc: Maintains oil integrity under extreme heat and oxidative stress, extending drain intervals.

features.title: High Detergency & Dispersancy
features.desc: Keeps engines clean under both high and low temperature conditions, preventing sludge and deposit buildup.

features.title: Superior Load-Carrying Capacity
features.desc: Advanced additive package reduces wear on cylinder bores and piston rings, extending engine life in heavy-duty applications.

features.title: Effective Corrosion Protection
features.desc: Protects all critical engine components from corrosive damage, even in engines running on high-sulfur diesel fuels.

applications: High-speed turbocharged or naturally aspirated diesel engines
High-performance gasoline engines in mixed-fleet operations
Engines operating on high-sulfur diesel fuels
approvals: API CI-4 / CH-4 / CG-4 / SJ / SL

faqs.q: Can Laon Burst 15W-40 be used in both diesel and gasoline engines?
faqs.a: Yes. The API CI-4/SL rating makes it suitable for both heavy-duty diesel and gasoline engines, ideal for mixed-fleet operations.

faqs.q: Is this oil suitable for turbocharged trucks?
faqs.a: Yes, Bagani Laon Burst 15W-40 is specifically formulated for high-speed turbocharged and naturally aspirated diesel engines in commercial vehicles.

faqs.q: What is TBN and why does it matter?
faqs.a: TBN (Total Base Number) measures the oil's ability to neutralize acids. A TBN of 11 mgKOH/g means Laon Burst provides strong acid neutralization, protecting your engine from corrosion caused by combustion byproducts.
